title: Marketplace Manager - Zebronics South Asia Partners - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zebronics South Asia Partners - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Zebronics South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zebronics South Asia Partners:
Zebronics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics South Asia Partners!
